ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "article_title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was published */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the article */,
  "sentence" TEXT /* A sample sentence from the article */,
  "news_link" TEXT /* Link to the news article */,
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the news outlet */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topic of the article */,
  "political_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the political type of the article */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Group identifier for articles that are part of the same story */,
  "num_sent" INTEGER /* Number of sentences in the article */,
  "label_bias" TEXT /* Label indicating the presence of bias (e.g., Biased, Non-biased) */,
  "label_opinion" TEXT /* Label indicating the opinion expressed in the article (e.g., Somewhat factual but also opinionated, Entirely factual) */,
  "article_text" TEXT /* Full text of the article */,
  "bias_words" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of words that contribute to the bias */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., online, print, broadcast) */,
  "article_status" TEXT /* Status of the article (e.g., published, draft, archived) */,
  "article_length" INTEGER /* Length of the article in words */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Engagement score based on likes, shares, and comments */,
  "bias_score" REAL /* Numerical score indicating the degree of bias (e.g., -1 to 1) */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Numerical score indicating the sentiment (e.g., -1 to 1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_political_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("political_type_id") REFERENCES political_types ("political_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_outlet_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_id") REFERENCES outlets ("outlet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outlets" (
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outlet */,
  "outlet_name" TEXT /* Name of the news outlet */,
  "outlet_url" TEXT /* URL of the news outlet */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the outlet */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the outlet was founded */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the outlet is based */,
  "outlet_status" TEXT /* Status of the outlet (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "bias_score" REAL /* Average bias score of articles from this outlet */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Average sentiment score of articles from this outlet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outlet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "topic_weight" REAL /* Weight of the topic in the overall analysis */,
  "topic_status" TEXT /* Status of the topic (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "political_types" (
  "political_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political type */,
  "political_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the political type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the political type */,
  "bias_score" REAL /* Average bias score of articles with this political type */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Average sentiment score of articles with this political type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("political_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the article */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the article */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the article */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "publication_count" INTEGER /* Number of articles published by the author */,
  "bias_score" REAL /* Average bias score of articles written by the author */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Average sentiment score of articles written by the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
